title: rapuntium gibbosum
intro: Rapuntium gibbosum, also known as the prickly poppy or common celandine, is a plant species that belongs to the poppy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Rapuntium gibbosum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Rapuntium gibbosum can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
